questions.question: Plumbing work karte samay basic safety gear mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Casual clothes, sandals

questions.explanation: Plumbing work karte samay aankhon, haathon aur sir ki suraksha ke liye safety goggles, gloves aur hard hat zaroori hain.

questions.question: Pipe cutting ke liye kaun sa tool sabse zyada use hota hai PVC pipes mein?

options.B: Pipe cutter

questions.explanation: PVC pipes ko saaf aur seedha kaatne ke liye pipe cutter sabse efficient tool hai. Hacksaw bhi use ho sakta hai, but pipe cutter zyada precise hota hai.

questions.question: GI (Galvanized Iron) pipe ko join karne ke liye generally kaun si technique use ki jaati hai?

options.B: Threading

questions.explanation: GI pipes ko threads kaat kar fittings ke saath screw kiya jaata hai. Is process ko threading kehte hain.

questions.question: PPR (Polypropylene Random Copolymer) pipes ko join karne ka standard method kya hai?

options.B: Solvent welding

questions.explanation: PPR pipes ko heat fusion machine ka use karke garam kiya jaata hai aur phir unhe ek saath fuse kar diya jaata hai, jisse ek leak-proof joint banta hai.

questions.question: Ek plumber ko confined space mein kaam karte samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Zyada logon ko andar bhejna

questions.explanation: Confined spaces mein oxygen ki kami aur harmful gases ka khatra hota hai, isliye proper ventilation aur lighting bahut zaroori hai safety ke liye.

questions.question: Copper pipes ko join karne ke liye kaun sa method commonly use hota hai, especially water supply lines mein?

options.B: Soldering ya Brazing

questions.explanation: Copper pipes ko soldering (soft solder) ya brazing (hard solder) se join kiya jaata hai, jisse ek strong aur leak-proof joint banta hai.

questions.question: CPVC pipes ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Corrugated Polyvinyl Chloride

questions.explanation: CPVC ka full form Chlorinated Polyvinyl Chloride hai, aur yeh high-temperature water applications ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Heavy duty pipes ko lift karne ke liye kaun sa safety precaution lena chahiye?

options.B: Lifting equipment ya team lift ka use karna

questions.explanation: Heavy pipes ko uthane ke liye back injuries se bachne ke liye lifting equipment jaise trolleys ya cranes, ya phir team lift ka sahara lena chahiye.

questions.question: Pipe wrench ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Pipes ko bend karna
options.C: Pipes aur fittings ko tight ya loose karna

questions.explanation: Pipe wrench ka use pipes aur fittings ko pakadne aur unhe tight ya loose karne ke liye kiya jaata hai, especially GI pipes mein.

questions.question: Agar plumbing site par electrical hazard ho, toh plumber ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant power supply band karna aur supervisor ko inform karna
options.C: Khud se theek karne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Electrical hazards bahut khatarnak ho sakte hain. Turant power supply band karna aur qualified personnel ko inform karna sabse safe tareeka hai.

questions.question: PVC pipes kis temperature range tak safely use kiye ja sakte hain?

options.B: Low temperatures only
options.C: Ambient aur low temperature applications (cold water)

questions.explanation: PVC pipes mainly cold water supply aur drainage systems ke liye suitable hote hain. High temperatures par yeh deform ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek pipe fitting jo pipe ki direction ko 90 degree par change karta hai, use kya kehte hain?

options.B: Coupling

questions.explanation: Elbow fitting pipe ki direction ko badalne ke liye use hota hai, commonly 90 ya 45 degrees par.

questions.question: Pipe diameter ko measure karne ke liye commonly kis term ka use hota hai?

options.B: Outer Diameter (OD) ya Nominal Bore (NB)

questions.explanation: Pipes ke size ko generally Outer Diameter (OD) ya Nominal Bore (NB) se specify kiya jaata hai, jo uske andaruni ya bahari vyas ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Ek pipe jo do alag-alag diameter ke pipes ko jodne ke liye use hota hai, use kya kehte hain?

options.B: Reducer

questions.explanation: Reducer fitting ka use do alag-alag diameter ke pipes ko smoothly connect karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Thread sealant tape (PTFE tape) ka kya role hai threaded pipe joints mein?

options.B: Joint ko leak-proof banana

questions.explanation: PTFE tape threaded joints mein gaps ko fill karke unhe leak-proof banane mein madad karta hai aur fittings ko aasani se tight karne mein bhi.

questions.question: Building mein water supply ka primary source kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Municipal supply ya borewell

questions.explanation: Commercial buildings mein water supply mainly municipal corporations ya underground borewells se aata hai.

questions.question: Water distribution system mein pressure ko maintain karne ke liye kaun sa component use hota hai?

options.B: Pressure reducing valve (PRV)

questions.explanation: Pressure Reducing Valve (PRV) system mein high incoming pressure ko safe aur constant level par maintain karta hai, fixtures ko damage hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Ek valve jo water flow ko puri tarah se on ya off karta hai, use kya kehte hain?

options.B: Gate valve

questions.explanation: Gate valve ko isolation valve ke roop mein use kiya jaata hai, jo water flow ko puri tarah se allow ya stop karta hai.

questions.question: Water hammer kya hai aur isse kaise bach sakte hain?

options.A: Pipes mein paani ka thanda hona; insulaton se bach sakte hain
options.B: Pipes mein achanak pressure surge; air chambers ya water hammer arrestors se bach sakte hain
options.C: Pipes ka rust hona; painting se bach sakte hain
options.D: Paani ka leakage; tightening se bach sakte hain

questions.explanation: Water hammer pipes mein achanak valve band hone se paani ke flow ke rukne par hone wala shockwave hai. Isse bachne ke liye air chambers ya water hammer arrestors lagaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Commercial building mein water consumption ko measure karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Water meter

questions.explanation: Water meter paani ke consumption ko record karta hai, jo billing aur monitoring ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Backflow prevention device ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Contaminated water ko potable water supply mein wapas aane se rokna

questions.explanation: Backflow prevention devices critical hain potable water supply ko contamination se bachane ke liye, especially commercial settings mein.

questions.question: Ek valve jo sirf ek direction mein water flow allow karta hai, use kya kehte hain?

options.B: Gate valve

questions.explanation: Check valve ka design aisa hota hai ki woh paani ko sirf ek hi disha mein jaane deta hai, backflow ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Commercial washroom mein flush valve toilets ka use kyun kiya jaata hai compared to cistern type?

options.B: Zyada flush power aur continuous use ke liye suitable
options.D: Kam maintenance ki zaroorat hoti hai

questions.explanation: Flush valve toilets direct water supply se operate hote hain, jo high traffic commercial settings mein quick refill aur powerful flush provide karte hain.

questions.question: Water supply lines mein air pockets ko remove karne ke liye kaun sa device use hota hai?

options.B: Air vent valve

questions.explanation: Air vent valve system se trapped air ko release karta hai, jisse water flow smooth rehta hai aur water hammer jaise issues kam hote hain.

questions.question: Mall ke food court mein sinks ke liye kis type ke faucets prefer kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Heavy-duty, commercial-grade pre-rinse faucets

questions.explanation: Food court mein bartan dhone ke liye heavy-duty aur high-pressure pre-rinse faucets ki zaroorat hoti hai, jo efficient cleaning provide karte hain.

questions.question: Water supply piping system mein piping ka slope kitna hona chahiye?

options.B: Drainage ke liye slope jitna
options.C: Minimal slope for air bleeding and draining

questions.explanation: Water supply lines mein thoda sa slope maintain karna zaroori hai taaki air pockets ko easily bleed kiya ja sake aur system ko drain karna aasan ho.

questions.question: Ek building ke top floors par adequate water pressure maintain karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Booster pump ya overhead tank

questions.explanation: High-rise buildings mein top floors par pressure maintain karne ke liye booster pumps ya overhead water tanks ka use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Urinals mein water saving ke liye kaun si technology use hoti hai?

options.B: Sensor-based auto flush ya waterless urinals

questions.explanation: Commercial spaces mein water conservation ke liye sensor-based auto flush urinals ya waterless urinals bahut effective hote hain.

questions.question: Thermostatic mixing valve (TMV) ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Hot aur cold water ko mix karke constant safe temperature maintain karna

questions.explanation: TMV hot aur cold water ko mix karke ek constant aur safe outlet temperature maintain karta hai, scalds se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Water supply system mein corrosion ko rokne ke liye kaun se pipe materials prefer kiye jaate hain?

options.B: PVC, CPVC, PPR, Copper, Stainless Steel

questions.explanation: Corrosion-resistant materials jaise PVC, CPVC, PPR, Copper aur Stainless Steel modern water supply systems mein prefer kiye jaate hain longevity ke liye.

questions.question: Ek ball valve, gate valve se kis tarah alag hai?

options.A: Ball valve throttling ke liye behtar hai, gate valve on/off ke liye
options.B: Ball valve on/off ke liye behtar hai, gate valve throttling ke liye
options.D: Ball valve sirf hot water ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Ball valves quick on/off action ke liye hain aur throttling mein damage ho sakte hain. Gate valves bhi on/off ke liye hain but throttling ke liye globe valve zyada suitable hai.

questions.question: Overhead water tank se supply ke liye gravity flow use karte samay, pipes ka sizing kis factor par depend karta hai?

options.B: Flow rate requirement aur pressure head

questions.explanation: Gravity flow systems mein pipe sizing flow rate aur available pressure head (tank ki height) par depend karta hai taaki desired flow aur pressure mil sake.

questions.question: Agar building mein water pressure bahut high hai, toh fixtures ko damage hone se bachane ke liye kya install karna chahiye?

options.B: Pressure reducing valve (PRV)

questions.explanation: High water pressure se fixtures aur appliances damage ho sakte hain, isliye PRV install karna zaroori hai pressure ko safe level par lane ke liye.

questions.question: Commercial kitchens mein grease trap kyun install kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Grease aur solid food particles ko drainage system mein jaane se rokne ke liye
options.C: Water temperature control karne ke liye
options.D: Drainage pressure kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Grease traps commercial kitchens mein essential hain taaki grease aur food solids drainage pipes ko clog na karein aur sewage system ko nuksan na pahunchayein.

questions.question: Water supply pipes ko insulation kyun provide kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Pipes ko sundar banane ke liye
options.B: Heat loss/gain ko kam karne aur condensation rokne ke liye
options.C: Pipes ko mazboot karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Insulation hot water pipes mein heat loss kam karta hai aur cold water pipes mein condensation rokta hai, jisse energy efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: DWV system ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Drainage, Waste, and Vent

questions.explanation: DWV system drainage, waste aur vent pipes ko refer karta hai, jo building se wastewater ko bahar nikalte hain aur proper venting provide karte hain.

questions.question: P-trap ka main function kya hai?

options.B: Sewer gases ko building mein aane se rokna

questions.explanation: P-trap mein paani ka ek seal hota hai jo sewer gases ko fixture se hote hue building mein aane se rokta hai.

questions.question: Drainage pipes mein minimum slope kitna hona chahiye taaki proper flow ho?

options.B: 1:100 ya 1/4 inch per foot

questions.explanation: Drainage pipes ko proper slope (minimum 1/4 inch per foot ya 1:100) par install karna zaroori hai taaki gravity se wastewater aur solids easily flow kar sakein aur clog na ho.

questions.question: Vent pipe ka kya role hai DWV system mein?

options.B: Sewer gases ko bahar nikalna aur drain traps ko siphon hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Vent pipes sewer gases ko atmosphere mein release karte hain aur drainage system mein positive/negative pressure ko balance karte hain, jisse traps ke paani ka seal maintain rehta hai.

questions.question: Cleanout fitting kyun install kiya jaata hai drainage system mein?

options.A: Water flow regulate karne ke liye
options.B: Drainage pipes ko inspect aur unclog karne ke liye access provide karna
options.C: Waste ko filter karne ke liye
options.D: System ko aesthetic look dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Cleanouts drainage system ke important points par lagaye jaate hain taaki blockage hone par unhe easily access karke saaf kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Main stack ya soil stack ka kya function hai commercial building mein?

options.B: Sabhi floors se wastewater aur vent gases ko carry karna

questions.explanation: Main stack building ke sabhi fixtures se wastewater ko collect karke sewer line tak pahunchata hai aur vent gases ko roof tak le jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar vent pipe properly install na ho, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Traps siphon ho sakte hain, jisse sewer gases building mein aa sakte hain
options.C: Drainage pipes freeze ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Improper venting se drain traps siphon ho sakte hain, jisse trap seal toot jaata hai aur sewer gases building mein enter kar sakte hain, jo health hazard hai.

questions.question: Horizontal drainage pipes ke liye kis type ki fittings use karni chahiye?

options.B: Long sweep elbows ya combination wyes

questions.explanation: Horizontal drainage lines mein smooth flow maintain karne aur blockages rokne ke liye long sweep elbows aur combination wyes use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Floor drains commercial spaces mein kyun important hain?

options.B: Accidental spills, cleaning water aur condensation ko floor se drain karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Floor drains commercial kitchens, washrooms aur utility areas mein important hain taaki floors par paani jama na ho aur slip hazards na create hon.

questions.question: Sewage ejector pump ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Wastewater ko low-level fixtures se main sewer line tak pump karna

questions.explanation: Sewage ejector pumps basement ya aise areas se wastewater ko lift karte hain jahan gravity flow se main sewer line tak nahi pahunchaya ja sakta.

questions.question: Stack vent kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek pipe jo sirf fresh air deta hai
options.B: Main soil stack ka woh hissa jo highest fixture ke upar se roof tak extend hota hai
options.C: Ek separate vent pipe jo sirf ek fixture ko serve karta hai

questions.explanation: Stack vent main soil stack ka ek extension hota hai jo roof tak jaata hai, atmosphere mein gases release karta hai aur system ko vent karta hai.

questions.question: Agar drainage system mein foul smell aa rahi hai, toh iska kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Dry trap ya vent system mein blockage/failure

questions.explanation: Foul smell ka matlab hai ki sewer gases building mein aa rahe hain, jo dry traps (paani seal ka tootna) ya vent system mein blockage/failure ke karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Commercial building mein storm water drainage system ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Rainwater ko roof aur surrounding areas se safely drain karna
options.D: Firefighting ke liye paani store karna

questions.explanation: Storm water drainage system rainwater ko building aur uske aas-paas se collect karke storm sewer ya natural drainage system mein discharge karta hai.

questions.question: Interceptor trap ka kya use hai commercial plumbing mein?

options.B: Specific types ke waste (jaise grease, oil, sand) ko main drainage system mein jaane se rokna

questions.explanation: Interceptor traps special purpose traps hote hain jo specific contaminants ko drainage system mein enter karne se pehle separate karte hain.

questions.question: Drainage pipes ke liye kaun sa material commonly use hota hai commercial buildings mein?

options.B: GI

questions.explanation: Cast Iron (old buildings), PVC aur HDPE (modern buildings) drainage systems ke liye commonly use hone wale materials hain unki durability aur chemical resistance ke karan.

questions.question: Storage type water heater mein primary components kya hote hain?

options.B: Storage tank, heating element/burner, thermostat, pressure relief valve

questions.explanation: Storage water heater mein paani ko store karne ke liye tank, use garam karne ke liye element/burner, temperature control ke liye thermostat aur safety ke liye PRV hota hai.

questions.question: Tankless water heater ka main advantage kya hai?

options.B: Instant aur continuous hot water supply, energy efficient
options.D: Sirf cold water supply karta hai

questions.explanation: Tankless water heaters sirf demand par paani garam karte hain, jisse energy waste kam hota hai aur continuous hot water milta hai.

questions.question: Water heater mein temperature control ke liye kaun sa component use hota hai?

options.B: Thermostat

questions.explanation: Thermostat water heater mein desired temperature maintain karta hai, heating element ko on/off karke.

questions.question: Pressure Relief Valve (PRV) ka kya role hai water heater mein?

options.B: Excessive pressure aur temperature build-up ko relieve karke safety ensure karna

questions.explanation: PRV water heater mein overpressure ya overtemperature ki condition mein paani ya steam ko release karta hai, tank ke burst hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Commercial building mein multiple hot water outlets ke liye kaun sa system prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Individual small water heaters for each outlet
options.B: Centralized hot water system with circulation pumps

questions.explanation: Centralized hot water system with circulation pumps commercial buildings mein efficient aur consistent hot water supply provide karta hai multiple points par.

questions.question: Booster pump ka kya function hai building water supply system mein?

options.B: Water pressure ko badhana

questions.explanation: Booster pump low water pressure wale areas mein ya high-rise buildings ke upper floors par water pressure ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Hot water circulation system kyun use kiya jaata hai commercial buildings mein?

options.A: Water ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.B: Hot water ko fixtures tak jaldi pahunchane ke liye aur waiting time kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hot water circulation system continuously hot water ko pipes mein circulate karta hai, jisse tap kholte hi turant garam paani mil jaata hai.

questions.question: Solar water heater ka working principle kya hai?

options.B: Sunlight ki energy ka use karke paani garam karna
options.D: Wind energy se paani garam karna

questions.explanation: Solar water heaters sunlight ko thermal energy mein convert karke paani garam karte hain, jo eco-friendly aur energy-saving hai.

questions.question: Water heater ke anode rod ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Tank ko corrosion se bachana

questions.explanation: Anode rod (sacrificial anode) tank ko corrosion se bachata hai, khud corrode hokar tank ki life badhata hai.

questions.question: Heat pump water heater kaise kaam karta hai?

options.A: Directly electricity se paani garam karta hai
options.B: Ambient air se heat extract karke paani garam karta hai

questions.explanation: Heat pump water heaters air se heat extract karke paani garam karte hain, jo traditional electric water heaters se zyada energy efficient hote hain.

questions.question: Commercial hot water system mein Legionella bacteria growth ko rokne ke liye kya measures liye jaate hain?

options.B: Regularly system ko high temperature par flush karna (thermal disinfection) aur proper maintenance

questions.explanation: Legionella bacteria growth ko rokne ke liye hot water systems ko regularly high temperatures par thermal disinfection karna aur proper maintenance zaroori hai.

questions.question: Water heater sizing commercial buildings ke liye kis par depend karta hai?

options.B: Peak hot water demand, number of fixtures, occupancy

questions.explanation: Commercial water heaters ko size karte samay peak demand, fixtures ki sankhya aur building ki occupancy ko consider karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Expansion tank ka kya role hai hot water systems mein?

options.B: Hot water ke expand hone se hone wale pressure fluctuations ko absorb karna

questions.explanation: Jab paani garam hota hai, toh woh expand hota hai. Expansion tank is expansion ko absorb karke system mein excessive pressure build-up ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Centrifugal pump kis type ke applications ke liye suitable hai?

options.B: Clear water pumping ke liye (booster, circulation)

questions.explanation: Centrifugal pumps apni efficiency aur reliability ke karan clear water pumping applications jaise booster systems aur circulation systems mein commonly use hote hain.

questions.question: Agar hot water heater se low hot water pressure aa raha hai, toh kya possible cause ho sakta hai?

options.A: Cold water inlet pressure high hai
options.B: Sediment build-up in tank/pipes, faulty PRV, or partially closed valve

questions.explanation: Low hot water pressure ke kaaran sediment build-up, faulty PRV, ya kisi valve ka partially closed hona ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Commercial building mein firefighting plumbing system ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Aag bujhane ke liye paani provide karna

questions.explanation: Firefighting plumbing system ka primary goal aag lagne ki sthiti mein aag bujhane ke liye reliable water supply provide karna hai.

questions.question: Fire sprinkler system kitne types ke hote hain?

options.B: Wet pipe, Dry pipe, Pre-action, Deluge

questions.explanation: Fire sprinkler systems ke main types hain wet pipe (most common), dry pipe, pre-action aur deluge, har ek alag application ke liye design kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Wet pipe sprinkler system ka main feature kya hai?

options.A: Pipes mein hawa bhari hoti hai
options.B: Pipes mein paani hamesha bhara rehta hai
options.C: Pipes mein chemicals bhare hote hain

questions.explanation: Wet pipe system mein sprinkler pipes mein hamesha paani bhara rehta hai, jisse aag lagne par turant response milta hai.

questions.question: Dry pipe sprinkler system kahan use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Aise areas mein jahan freezing ka khatra ho

questions.explanation: Dry pipe systems un areas mein use hote hain jahan freezing temperatures ke karan wet pipe system damage ho sakta hai. Pipes mein compressed air hoti hai.

questions.question: Fire pump ka kya role hai firefighting system mein?

options.B: Sprinkler aur standpipe systems ke liye required water pressure maintain karna

questions.explanation: Fire pump fire sprinkler aur standpipe systems ke liye adequate pressure aur flow rate provide karta hai, especially large buildings mein.

questions.question: Standpipe system ka kya use hai?

options.B: Firefighters ko building ke andar aag bujhane ke liye water access provide karna

questions.explanation: Standpipe systems high-rise buildings mein firefighters ko direct water connection provide karte hain, jisse unhe har floor par hose line khinchne ki zaroorat nahi padti.

questions.question: Rainwater harvesting system ka main component kya hai?

options.B: Roof catchment area, gutters, downspouts, filter, storage tank

questions.explanation: Rainwater harvesting mein roof se paani collect kiya jaata hai, gutters aur downspouts se flow hota hai, filter hota hai aur phir storage tank mein jama hota hai.

questions.question: Greywater recycling system mein kis type ka paani treat kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Kitchen sink aur laundry ka paani

questions.explanation: Greywater mein bath, shower, wash basin aur laundry ka paani shamil hota hai. Ise treat karke toilet flushing, irrigation ya other non-potable uses ke liye use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Manifold plumbing system ka kya advantage hai?

options.B: Each fixture ko separate supply line milti hai, jisse pressure drop kam hota hai aur isolation easy hota hai
options.D: Sirf hot water ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Manifold system mein har fixture ko ek dedicated supply line milti hai, jisse pressure balance behtar hota hai aur maintenance ke dauran individual fixture ko isolate karna aasan hota hai.

questions.question: Commercial kitchen drainage mein grease interceptor kyun lagaya jaata hai?

options.A: Paani ko garam rakhne ke liye
options.B: Fats, oils aur grease (FOG) ko sewer system mein jaane se rokne ke liye
options.C: Paani ka pressure badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Grease interceptor FOG ko trap karta hai, jisse drainage pipes clog nahi hote aur municipal sewer system par load kam hota hai.

questions.question: Fire Hose Cabinet (FHC) mein kya components hote hain?

options.B: Hose reel, nozzle, control valve

questions.explanation: FHC mein ek hose reel, nozzle aur control valve hote hain jo occupants ya firefighters ko immediate fire suppression ke liye use karne ki suvidha dete hain.

questions.question: CPVC pipes ka use firefighting systems mein kahan hota hai?

options.B: Light hazard occupancies mein sprinkler systems

questions.explanation: CPVC pipes ko light hazard occupancies jaise offices aur residential buildings mein fire sprinkler systems ke liye use kiya jaata hai, unki corrosion resistance aur ease of installation ke karan.

questions.question: Pre-action sprinkler system ka kya fayda hai high-value areas mein?

options.A: Always paani hota hai pipes mein
options.B: Accidental water discharge ka risk kam hota hai kyunki do events trigger hone par hi paani flow karta hai

questions.explanation: Pre-action systems mein paani tabhi flow karta hai jab fire detection system activate ho aur sprinkler head bhi fuse ho, jisse accidental discharge se hone wale damage ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Commercial building mein disabled-friendly washroom design karte samay kya plumbing considerations hain?

options.B: Grab bars, accessible toilet height, lever handle faucets, roll-under sinks

questions.explanation: Disabled-friendly washrooms ke liye grab bars, proper toilet height, easy-to-operate faucets aur accessible sinks zaroori hain.

questions.question: Vacuum breaker ka kya use hai commercial plumbing mein?

options.B: Back-siphonage ke karan backflow ko rokna

questions.explanation: Vacuum breaker back-siphonage ke karan hone wale backflow ko rokta hai, jisse potable water supply contaminated hone se bachti hai.

questions.question: Large commercial buildings mein water supply lines ki routing plan karte samay kya important hai?

options.B: Accessibility for maintenance, pressure zones, future expansion, material compatibility

questions.explanation: Large buildings mein water supply routing plan karte samay accessibility, pressure zones, future expansion aur material compatibility jaise factors ko consider karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Firefighting system mein jockey pump ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: System pressure ko maintain karna aur leakage ke karan hone wale pressure drop ko compensate karna

questions.explanation: Jockey pump ek small pump hota hai jo firefighting system mein minor pressure losses ko compensate karta hai, taaki main fire pump baar-baar start na ho.

questions.question: Building mein water quality management kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Health aur safety, fixture longevity, operational efficiency ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper water quality health aur safety ke liye critical hai, aur yeh fixtures aur piping systems ki life bhi badhata hai.

questions.question: De-ionized water system ka use kahan hota hai commercial buildings mein?

options.B: Specialized applications jaise labs, manufacturing, ya boiler feed water

questions.explanation: De-ionized water system highly purified water provide karta hai jo labs, manufacturing processes aur boiler feed water jaise specialized applications ke liye zaroori hota hai.

questions.question: Modular plumbing systems ka kya fayda hai large projects mein?

options.B: Off-site prefabrication se installation time aur cost kam hoti hai, quality control behtar hota hai

questions.explanation: Modular plumbing systems mein components ko off-site assemble kiya jaata hai, jisse on-site installation faster aur more efficient ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Plumbing system ki preventive maintenance mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.A: Sirf repairs jab system fail ho
options.B: Regular inspections, cleaning, leak detection, valve testing

questions.explanation: Preventive maintenance mein regular check-ups aur minor adjustments shamil hote hain taaki bade breakdowns se bacha ja sake aur system ki life badhe.

questions.question: Agar kisi faucet se paani tapak raha hai (leaking faucet), toh kya possible cause ho sakta hai?

options.B: Worn-out washer ya O-ring

questions.explanation: Faucets se tapakne ka sabse common karan worn-out washer ya O-ring hota hai jo seal provide karta hai.

questions.question: Low water pressure ki problem ko diagnose karte samay kya steps lenge?

options.B: Main valve check karna, PRV check karna, aerator cleaning, leak detection

questions.explanation: Low water pressure ke liye main water supply valve, PRV, aerators aur hidden leaks ko check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Plumbing codes (jaise NBC - National Building Code) ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Minimum standards set karna for design, installation, aur maintenance of plumbing systems for safety and health

questions.explanation: Plumbing codes public health aur safety ko ensure karne ke liye minimum requirements set karte hain.

questions.question: Water conservation ke liye commercial buildings mein kya measures liye ja sakte hain?

options.B: Low-flow fixtures, sensor faucets, greywater recycling, rainwater harvesting

questions.explanation: Water conservation ke liye low-flow fixtures, efficient technologies aur water recycling methods apnana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Drainage system mein blockage ko remove karne ke liye kaun se tools use hote hain?

options.B: Plunger, drain snake/auger, hydro-jetter

questions.explanation: Blockages ko hatane ke liye plunger, drain snake/auger aur hydro-jetter jaise specialized tools use hote hain.

questions.question: Green plumbing practices ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf green color ki pipes use karna
options.B: Environment-friendly aur water-efficient plumbing solutions use karna

questions.explanation: Green plumbing practices mein water conservation, energy efficiency aur sustainable materials ka use shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar water heater se foul smell aa rahi hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Bacteria build-up in tank, anode rod problem

questions.explanation: Foul smell (rotten egg smell) usually anaerobic bacteria ke build-up ya anode rod ke reaction ke karan hoti hai. Tank flushing ya anode rod replacement se theek ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Cross-connection kya hai aur isse kyun bachna chahiye?

options.A: Do alag-alag type ke pipes ko jodna
options.B: Potable water supply aur non-potable (contaminated) source ka physical connection, jo backflow aur contamination ka risk badhata hai

questions.explanation: Cross-connection bahut hazardous hota hai kyunki isse contaminated water potable supply mein enter kar sakta hai. Backflow prevention devices isse rokne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Commercial plumbing systems ke annual inspection mein kya-kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Leaks, corrosion, valve functionality, pump performance, backflow preventers, water heater efficiency

questions.explanation: Comprehensive annual inspection mein sabhi critical components ki functionality aur integrity check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Sustainable plumbing design ka ek important aspect kya hai?

options.B: Water efficiency aur long-lasting materials ka use

questions.explanation: Sustainable plumbing design mein water aur energy conservation ke saath-saath durable aur eco-friendly materials ka use karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi commercial toilet mein flush continuously chal raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Faulty flush valve seal ya fill valve

questions.explanation: Continuous flush ka matlab hai ki flush valve seal theek se band nahi ho raha ya fill valve defected hai, jisse paani waste ho raha hai.

questions.question: Noise in plumbing pipes ka kya common cause ho sakta hai?

options.B: Loose pipes, high water pressure, water hammer, air in system

questions.explanation: Pipes mein noise loose supports, excessive pressure, water hammer ya trapped air ke karan ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Plumbing infrastructure ki digital documentation kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Efficient maintenance, troubleshooting, future upgrades aur compliance ke liye

questions.explanation: Digital documentation (drawings, manuals, service history) plumbing systems ke efficient management aur future planning ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Emergency shut-off valves ka location aur functionality check karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Emergency mein paani supply ko jaldi band karne ke liye aur bade nuksan se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency shut-off valves ka sahi location aur working condition pata hona bahut zaroori hai taaki leakage ya pipe burst jaise emergencies mein paani supply ko turant band kiya ja sake.
